title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 is a major release introducing a native desktop application for macOS, Linux, and Windows, remote gateway support for distributed setups, an enhanced web admin dashboard, improved model selection with fuzzy search, and security hardening including safer SSRF checks and subprocess handling.
